title: ‘Everest Man’ breaks his own record after historic 32nd climb
full_text:
‘Everest Man’ breaks his own record after historic 32nd climb
‘Everest Man’ breaks his own record after historic 32nd climb
Legendary mountaineer Kami Rita Sherpa just broke his own record after climbing Mount Everest for the 32nd time. Nicknamed the ‘Everest Man,’ he climbed the peak for the first time in 1994.
Published On 22 May 2026
